name: Razorpay
description: India's leading payment gateway for businesses with UPI, cards, netbanking, wallets, and payroll services for 8M+ merchants
pros: Reverse-flipped to India in May 2025 — now an Indian company
Founders hold 65.4% with differential voting rights
Most popular payment gateway for Indian startups and businesses
Comprehensive suite: payments, payroll (RazorpayX), lending (Razorpay Capital)
cons: Tiger Global, GIC still hold significant minority stakes
Transaction fees can add up for high-volume merchants
Settlement times (T+2) slower than some competitors
Support quality drops for smaller merchants
userComplaints: Account activation process can be slow with extensive documentation required
Dispute resolution process favors customers over merchants
Dashboard can be slow and complex for non-technical users
